nodes.text: Good evening. Let’s take a moment to reflect on your day.
How would you describe your day overall?
When things went well, what contributed most?
When things didn’t go well, what was your first reaction?
You recognized your role in outcomes today. That’s agency — even small decisions matter.
It felt like things were outside your control. But even then, there were moments you made choices — noticing them is powerful.
Now let’s shift from control to contribution.
Which best describes your behavior today?
Why did you help?
What bothered you most?
You leaned toward contribution today. That’s how strong teams are built — through actions beyond obligation.
You noticed what you didn’t receive. That’s natural — but shifting toward what you can give often creates momentum.
Now let’s expand the lens beyond just you.
When thinking about today’s biggest challenge, who comes to mind?
What made it feel personal?
How did others impact your thinking?
You focused on your own experience today. That’s valid — but sometimes stepping outward brings clarity.
You considered others in your thinking. That’s a wider perspective — and often leads to deeper meaning.
Today you showed patterns in control, contribution, and perspective. Small awareness leads to big change over time.
Reflection complete. See you tomorrow.
